title: Korean Oatmeal Kalguksu
description: A warm and comforting Korean-inspired oatmeal, infused with the flavors of kalguksu noodles and topped with a gentle sprinkle of earthy sesame seeds.

ingredients.name: Kalguksu Noodles
ingredients.notes: dried kalguksu noodles can be found at Asian markets

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: grated or sliced, for added flavor

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add the kalguksu noodles and cook according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sesame oil, soy sauce, and brown sugar (if using).
Add the grated ginger to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Once the noodles are cooked, add the sesame oil mixture to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the rolled oats to the saucepan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the oatmeal hot, topped with a sprinkle of dark sesame seeds.
